title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Amrapali Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Amrapali Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
